name: Graph Data Loading
summary: Frontend store and page for loading and managing graph data state
goals: Manage graph data loading state with caching and error handling
Provide the main GraphPage container for visualization views

specDetail.description: A graphStore state management module and GraphPage component that handles loading graph data from the API, caching results, managing loading/error states, and providing the data to visualization components.

parameters.name: refreshInterval
parameters.description: Auto-refresh interval in ms (0 for disabled)

parameters.name: includeDrafts
parameters.description: Whether to include draft nodes in the loaded data

constraints: Must cache loaded graph data to avoid redundant API calls
Must show a loading skeleton while data is being fetched
Must handle and display errors when the graph API is unavailable

acceptanceCriteria.then: graph data is fetched from the API and passed to visualization components

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
